basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: B.Tech., B.Sc., or equivalent degree in Aerospace Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Computer Science, Civil Engineering, Physics, Mathematics, or a related discipline, with a strong academic record. Basic understanding of fluid mechanics and turbomachinery flows. Experience in scientific programming/coding and machine learning. Experience in Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD). Good written and oral communication skills.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Kanpur Project Assistant (PA) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Project Assistant (PA) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the IIT Kanpur Project Assistant (PA) posts is 27th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant (PA) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant (PA) position at IIT Kanpur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant (PA) role?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Tech., B.Sc., or equivalent degree in relevant engineering or science disciplines, along with specific skills in fluid mechanics, programming, and CFD.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant (PA) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 32,400 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Project Assistant (PA) posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant (PA) role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Project Assistant (PA) is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Kanpur located?
faq.answer: IIT Kanpur is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the Important Links section of this article.
